---
name: ✨ Enhancement Request
about: Improve or extend an existing feature
title: "[Enhancement]: "
labels: ["type: enhancement"]
---

## 🎯 Objective:
_What is the context of this enhancement? Which existing feature needs to be improved or extended?_

## 📜 Requirements

### Scope
_Provide a description and scope of the enhancement. Explain the goals, objectives, and benefits of this enhancement. This will form the basis for a brief description._

### Current Behavior
_Describe what the feature currently does and why it is insufficient or could be improved._

### Expected Behavior
_What do you expect the feature to do after the enhancement?_

### Use Case(s)
_Provide use cases to understand the scope and requirements better. How would the enhancement benefit users?_

### User interface
_Describe the changes to the user interface, if any. Explain how the user will interact with this enhanced feature._

## ⏭️  Next actions

- [ ]
